title: Better Chainmail Armor
description: Improves the appearance of the chainmail armor
body:
The chainmail armor has a very simple and flat texture, with this pack it won't be like that anymore! I improved the texture of the armor giving it more detail and shading with new colors (same colors that are used for the illagers metal)

---
